metadata.context:
[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (bio.md) About › Value proposition

Full-stack and cloud engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered
apps with RAG, agents, and evals, on a foundation that's shipped to 100k+ daily
users.

[3] (resume.md) Résumé › Technical Skills

- **Languages:** Python, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Java, C, C++, C#, SQL,
  Bash
- **Web Stack:** HTML, CSS, React (Native), Redux, REST APIs, Node.js, Express,
  MongoDB, Next.js
- **Cloud (AWS):** EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, SES, CloudFront, CloudWatch
- **DevOps:** Git, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Netlify, Appium/Selenium, CI/CD, Jira
- **Machine Learning:** TensorFlow, Keras, NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn,
  Matplotlib, SageMaker
- **AI Engineering:** LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, OpenAI API, Anthropic/Claude
  API, Embeddings, Vector Databases, LangChain, AI Agents, Evals & LLMOps

[4] (resume.md) Résumé › Education

**Toronto Metropolitan University (formerly Ryerson University)** —
September 2017 – April 2022
Bachelor of Science (Honours), Computer Science (Co-operative)

Coursework: Algorithms, Data Structures, Database Systems, Web Systems
Development, Computer Networks, Computer Security, Software Engineering,
Computer Graphics, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, Machine Learning,
Autonomous Robotics, Virtual Reality.

[5] (skills.md) Skills › AI Engineering

- LLMs (large language models)
- Prompt Engineering
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- OpenAI API
- Anthropic / Claude API
- Embeddings
- Vector Databases
- LangChain
- AI Agents
- Evals & LLMOps

[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (bio.md) About › Value proposition

Full-stack and cloud engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered
apps with RAG, agents, and evals, on a foundation that's shipped to 100k+ daily
users.

[3] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

[4] (skills.md) Skills

My skills, grouped by category. I focus on AI engineering today, built on a
full-stack and cloud foundation.

[5] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[3] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

[4] (bio.md) About › Availability

I'm currently open to work and looking for AI engineering roles.

[5] (resume.md) Résumé › Contact

- Email: momin@chaudhry.tv
- Website: https://mominchaudhry.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mominchaudhry
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/momin-chaudhry-b9364917b

metadata.context:
[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[3] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

[4] (bio.md) About › Availability

I'm currently open to work and looking for AI engineering roles.

[5] (resume.md) Résumé › Contact

- Email: momin@chaudhry.tv
- Website: https://mominchaudhry.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mominchaudhry
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/momin-chaudhry-b9364917b
- Location: Toronto, Canada

metadata.context:
[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[3] (experience.md) Experience › Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst

**Toronto, Canada · Full-time · May 2019 – August 2020**

- Reduced Crashlytics reports by 90%+ by investigating and fixing front-end bugs
  and crashes in Purolator's Android app.
- Built automated regression scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium and
  Selenium.
- Ran sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) across iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web.
- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.

[4] (experience.md) Experience › Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)

**Toronto, Canada · Full-time · May 2021 – December 2021**

Clearbridge Mobile is a digital product agency building mobile and
connected-TV apps for enterprise clients.

- Built and shipped features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app serving
  100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Cut page and stream response times by 50%+ by optimizing routing in the React
  web app.
- Owned the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across platforms and tuned cloud
  infrastructure to save $200+/month.
- Partnered closely with stakeholders to keep delivery smooth across the team.

[5] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app

  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).

  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.

- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.

  and web applications.

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social

- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.

[3] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[4] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[5] (bio.md) About › Value proposition

Full-stack and cloud engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered
apps with RAG, agents, and evals, on a foundation that's shipped to 100k+ daily
users.

[3] (experience.md) Experience › Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)

**Toronto, Canada · Full-time · May 2021 – December 2021**

Clearbridge Mobile is a digital product agency building mobile and
connected-TV apps for enterprise clients.

- Built and shipped features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app serving
  100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Cut page and stream response times by 50%+ by optimizing routing in the React
  web app.
- Owned the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across platforms and tuned cloud
  infrastructure to save $200+/month.
- Partnered closely with stakeholders to keep delivery smooth across the team.

[4] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[5] (experience.md) Experience › Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst

**Toronto, Canada · Full-time · May 2019 – August 2020**

- Reduced Crashlytics reports by 90%+ by investigating and fixing front-end bugs
  and crashes in Purolator's Android app.
- Built automated regression scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium and
  Selenium.
- Ran sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) across iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web.
- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.

unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

learning, computer vision, and autonomous robotics, alongside the core CS
curriculum — algorithms, data structures, database systems, computer networks,
computer security, software engineering, and computer graphics.

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).

  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.

  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

[3] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

[4] (bio.md) About › Availability

I'm currently open to work and looking for AI engineering roles.

[5] (resume.md) Résumé › Contact

- Email: momin@chaudhry.tv
- Website: https://mominchaudhry.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/mominchaudhry
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/momin-chaudhry-b9364917b
- Location: Toronto, Canada

[1] (bio.md) About

I'm Momin Chaudhry, an AI Engineer based in Toronto, Canada. I'm a software
engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.

[2] (skills.md) Skills › Cloud (AWS)

- EC2
- Lambda
- S3
- RDS
- DynamoDB
- CloudFront
- SES
- CloudWatch

[3] (resume.md) Résumé › Technical Skills

- **Languages:** Python, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Java, C, C++, C#, SQL,
  Bash
- **Web Stack:** HTML, CSS, React (Native), Redux, REST APIs, Node.js, Express,
  MongoDB, Next.js
- **Cloud (AWS):** EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda, DynamoDB, SES, CloudFront, CloudWatch
- **DevOps:** Git, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Netlify, Appium/Selenium, CI/CD, Jira
- **Machine Learning:** TensorFlow, Keras, NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn,
  Matplotlib, SageMaker
- **AI Engineering:** LLMs, Prompt Engineering, RAG, OpenAI API, Anthropic/Claude
  API, Embeddings, Vector Databases, LangChain, AI Agents, Evals & LLMOps

[4] (experience.md) Experience › Freelance / Independent — Full-Stack Software Engineer

**Remote · Contract · August 2020 – Present**

Full-stack contract work building web apps and cloud infrastructure for small
businesses and nonprofits.

- Built an e-commerce store for a musician to sell music and surface social
  links (Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe).
- Designed and shipped an SEO-focused, CMS-driven donation site for the Basera
  orphanage in Pakistan.
- Launched a barbershop booking app integrating Setmore and a CRM for
  appointment management.

[5] (resume.md) Résumé › Experience

### Clearbridge Mobile — Software Engineer (Frontend)
*May 2021 – December 2021*

- Developed and released new features end-to-end for a React video-streaming app
  with 100k+ daily active users (The YES Network).
- Reduced page and stream response times by more than 50% by optimizing routes
  in the React web app.
- Managed the Node.js serverless backend on AWS across all platforms and
  optimized cloud infrastructure to save over $200/month.
- Worked closely with all team members and stakeholders to ensure smooth
  delivery.

### Freelance — Software Engineer (Full-stack)
*August 2020 – Present*

- Created an e-commerce store for a client to sell music and promote social
  links (React/Next.js, Node.js, AWS, Stripe SDK).
- Designed and developed the Basera orphanage website (Pakistan) to spread
  awareness and collect donations — SEO focus with a CMS for easy content
  management.
- Founded a barbershop and built its booking app with React and Setmore to
  manage appointments and integrate with a CRM.

### Clearbridge Mobile — QA Analyst
*May 2019 – August 2020*

- Collaborated with developers, managers, and QA across projects in an agile
  environment.
- Investigated and fixed front-end bugs and crashes in Purolator's Android app,
  reducing Crashlytics reports by over 90%.
- Developed automated regression test scripts for CI/CD pipelines using Appium
  and Selenium.
- Performed sanity, regression, and load testing (JMeter) on iOS, tvOS, Android,
  and web applications.

engineer focused on AI engineering — building LLM-powered systems end to end:
retrieval pipelines, agents, and the eval harnesses that keep them honest.

I come at AI from a full-stack and cloud background — React front ends serving
100k+ daily users and serverless Node.js/AWS backends — so I care about the
unglamorous part: shipping AI that's reliable, fast, and cheap to run.
